title: RandomAdminTools
description: This mod allows fabric servers to allow operators/admins to be better in the server. The items such as the 'Admin Sword' allows you to instakill any entities (may be bugged), that includes the warden, wither and ender dragon. Might have mod confliction!
body:
```This mod is now archived, due to being abandoned and mod files have been lost. (And plus, who would even download this?? This was such a bad idea.)```


# About this Mod
As said, this mod allows fabric servers to allow operators/admins to be better in the server. The items such as the 'Admin Sword' allows you to instakill any entities (may be bugged), that includes the warden, wither and ender dragon. Might have mod confliction!

A mod that assists your moderator and admins to do their job, fabric and forge compatible but seperate file. Works only on 1.20.1, and is double sided. **Recommended to rename the file to hide it from your friends and family! (And probably community if you did.)**. Mostly good for PVP Servers because of it's indestructable armor and the strongest sword in-game. The sword is unable to be burnt in lava.

NOTE: It was a work in progress until abandoned. No updates WILL be issued.
